studyName: Whole Exome Sequencing and Methylation Profiling of Uveal Melanoma

tables.description: This subject phenotype table contains subject IDs, sex, eye affected by uveal melanoma, whether the tumor involved the ciliary body, the largest tumor basal diameter, thickness of the tumor, whether the tumor invaded extraocular structures, gene expression class, initial treatment, age at the first day of treatment, metastatic status, and whether the subject died of melanoma related causes.

variables.name: Age_at_initial_treatment
variables.description: Age of the subject on the first day of treatment

variables.name: Extraocular_Invasion
variables.description: Whether the subject's tumor invaded extraocular structures

variables.name: Eye
variables.description: The eye affected by uveal melanoma

variables.name: Initial_Treatment
variables.description: Initial treatment of patients on presentation

variables.name: Involves_Ciliary_Body
variables.description: Whether the tumor involved the ciliary body

variables.name: LBD
variables.description: The largest tumor basal diameter

variables.name: Melanoma_specific_morality
variables.description: Whether the subject died of melanoma related causes

variables.name: Metastasis
variables.description: Metastatic status of the uveal meloma tumor

variables.name: Molecular_Class
variables.description: Gene Expression Class of the subject. Class 1 is low risk of metastasis, and Class 2 is high risk.

variables.name: Predom_CB
variables.description: Whether the tumor involved primarily the ciliary body

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified Subject ID

variables.name: Sex
variables.description: Gender of the participant.

variables.name: Thickness
variables.description: The thickness of the tumor

tables.description: The subject consent file includes subject IDs, consent information, subject aliases, and case control status of the subject for uveal melanoma.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Presence or Absence of Uveal Melanoma

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate

tables.description: This data table contains a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs. The data table also includes sample aliases and sample use.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where samples originate

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample Use

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: This sample attributes table contains sample IDs, body type, analyte type, and tumor status.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID
